text:
Roto Mountains (, Rōto Sanmyaku) are mountains in the Republic of Rokario. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 21, Chapter 218 

Overview

The mountains of Roto are a group of mountains that are located in the central-southern part of the Republic of Rokario and that intersects into the Republic of Hass. 

Plot

Chimera Ant arc

The Roto Mountains' location appears on Killua's Beatle-07 map. 

Trivia

The Roto Mountains, despite being shown, aren't named in the 2011 anime adaptation.

References

 

fr:Roto
